title: SynthesisStep + fleet-synthesis.json artifact
description: After the rounds complete, assemble a PURE data bundle of the final-round child results plus all blackboard findings and write it to a separate <rootDir>/.bober/fleet-synthesis.json for the head to synthesize. New file src/fleet/synthesis.ts exports: type SynthesisBundle = { rounds: number; childResults: <the final executions/outcomes shape used by the reporter>; findings: FactRecord[] }; function collect(blackboard: SharedBlackboard | null, childResults, rounds): SynthesisBundle — findings = blackboard ? blackboard.readAll() : []; returns the bundle; performs NO LLM call and no network. Wire into runFleet: when a blackboard was used, after the rounds + the existing fleet-report.json write, call collect(...) and atomically write fleet-synthesis.json (tmp+rename, mirroring the report writer); when no blackboard, write NOTHING (byte-identical). The existing fleet-report.json remains unchanged in shape and is always written.

successCriteria.description: Build + typecheck pass with zero errors.
Full suite passes; only the 6 known cockpit-integration MCP failures may fail; existing fleet report/index tests pass unchanged.

SynthesisStep.collect(blackboard, childResults, rounds) returns { rounds, childResults, findings } where findings===blackboard.readAll(); when blackboard is null it returns findings:[] and the caller writes NO file. A test asserts both branches.

On a blackboard-enabled run, <rootDir>/.bober/fleet-synthesis.json is written containing the final-round childResults + all findings + the round count; the existing fleet-report.json is also written and unchanged in shape. A test runs a blackboard fleet and asserts both files exist with the expected content.
SynthesisStep performs NO LLM/network call — a test asserts no provider/client is constructed and no network import exists in synthesis.ts.

When no blackboard is configured, NO fleet-synthesis.json is written and the run output is byte-identical to Phase A (the existing fleet tests pass unchanged; a test asserts the file is absent on a no-blackboard run).
lint passes; the synthesis write is additive + gated on a blackboard being used; the fleet-report.json shape/behavior is unchanged.

nonGoals: Do NOT perform any LLM synthesis — collect is pure data; the head/dynamic-workflow synthesizes.
Do NOT change the fleet-report.json shape or stop writing it.
Do NOT write fleet-synthesis.json on a no-blackboard run.
Do NOT change the rounds loop (Sprint 3) or the blackboard module (Sprint 1).
stopConditions: fleet-synthesis.json is written (final childResults + all findings + rounds) only on a blackboard run, collect is pure (no LLM), the report is unchanged, the no-blackboard path is byte-identical, and build/typecheck/test/lint are green
definitionOfDone: src/fleet/synthesis.ts exports SynthesisBundle + collect (pure, no LLM/network). runFleet writes <rootDir>/.bober/fleet-synthesis.json (atomic tmp+rename) on a blackboard run after the report; writes nothing extra otherwise; fleet-report.json unchanged. Collocated tests cover collect (blackboard + null), the written synthesis file content, the no-LLM assertion, and the no-file-on-no-blackboard byte-identical path. Build/typecheck/test/lint green.
assumptions: Sprint 3 made the rounds available and exposes the final-round executions/outcomes (the same shape the reporter consumes) and the round count to runFleet.
SharedBlackboard.readAll() (Sprint 1) returns FactRecord[]; collect just bundles it — no transformation beyond shaping the JSON.
The atomic writer pattern (tmp filename via randomBytes + rename) used for fleet-report.json / fleet-expand.json is reused for fleet-synthesis.json.
fleet-report.json continues to be written for every run (blackboard or not); fleet-synthesis.json is ADDITIONAL and only on blackboard runs.
generatorNotes:
Read FIRST: src/fleet/index.ts (runFleet — the report build+write at :124, and the Sprint-3 rounds wiring; you add the synthesis write right after the report write, gated on the blackboard being used); src/fleet/reporter.ts (PortfolioReport shape — reuse for childResults in the bundle); src/fleet/shared-blackboard.ts (readAll); src/state/facts.ts (FactRecord shape); the atomic write helper used for fleet-report.json / manifest-write.ts (tmp+rename). arch SynthesisStep component (CP3) — it is PURE data assembly, NOT an LLM call.

New src/fleet/synthesis.ts: export interface SynthesisBundle { rounds: number; childResults: <PortfolioReport or the outcomes array>; findings: FactRecord[] }; export function collect(blackboard: SharedBlackboard | null, childResults, rounds): SynthesisBundle { return { rounds, childResults, findings: blackboard ? blackboard.readAll() : [] }; }. No imports of providers/network.

runFleet: after writing fleet-report.json, if (dbPath /* blackboard used */) { const bundle = collect(bb, report /*or outcomes*/, roundsRun); const out = join(rootDir, '.bober', 'fleet-synthesis.json'); atomic tmp+rename write JSON.stringify(bundle, null, 2); }. Ensure bb is still open (readAll) before close — sequence: run rounds → build+write report → collect+write synthesis → bb.close(). Adjust the Sprint-3 finally so close happens after synthesis.

Tests (synthesis.test.ts + index.test.ts additions): collect with a real SharedBlackboard (tmp db, seed findings) → bundle.findings matches readAll; collect(null, ...) → findings:[]; a blackboard fleet run (DI fakes) → assert .bober/fleet-synthesis.json exists with rounds+childResults+findings AND fleet-report.json exists unchanged; a no-blackboard run → assert fleet-synthesis.json is ABSENT; grep synthesis.ts for provider/network imports (none). Follow ESM .js imports, import type, unicode section headers, no synchronous fs.
evaluatorNotes: sc-4-3: collect with a seeded blackboard → findings===readAll(); collect(null,...) → findings:[]. sc-4-4: run a blackboard fleet (DI) → assert .bober/fleet-synthesis.json exists and parses to {rounds, childResults, findings}; assert fleet-report.json still written and its shape unchanged. sc-4-5: grep synthesis.ts for '@anthropic-ai/sdk'|'openai'|'fetch'|'node:http'|'node:net' (none); assert collect constructs no client. sc-4-6 (byte-identical): a no-blackboard run → assert NO fleet-synthesis.json is created and the existing fleet index/report tests pass unchanged. sc-4-2: FULL suite, only 6 known cockpit failures. Build/typecheck/lint clean.
